author: mkshp-dev
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Create interactive image galleries in your notes using obs-gallery code blocks. Supports multiple view types (thumbnail, carousel, grid) and both local vault images and external URLs.

manifest.author: mkshp
manifest.description: Create interactive image galleries in your notes using obs-gallery code blocks. Supports multiple view types (thumbnail, carousel, grid) and both local vault images and external URLs.
manifest.name: Gallery View

name: Gallery View

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Refactor code structure and upgrade Docusaurus for deployment fixes by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/7
* ⚡ Bolt: Optimize isImageFile string splitting performance by @mkshp-dev in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/11
* Enhance GridView responsiveness and release version bump by @mukundshelake in https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/pull/12


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mkshp-dev/obsidian-gallery-plugin/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3
